## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Knapsack and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO approach, and next steps for Knapsack's website and marketing efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/qycLyD5iLo8UfmnW4VzQNWSpyuKCZkDg?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content strategy shifting to focus on AI-specific use cases, particularly for meeting prep and financial advisors](https://fathom.video/share/qycLyD5iLo8UfmnW4VzQNWSpyuKCZkDg?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [SEO approach involves testing various keywords and content types, with plans to optimize based on performance](https://fathom.video/share/qycLyD5iLo8UfmnW4VzQNWSpyuKCZkDg?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [New website (knapsack.ai) launching soon; content will need to be updated accordingly](https://fathom.video/share/qycLyD5iLo8UfmnW4VzQNWSpyuKCZkDg?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
  - [Expectation set for gradual improvement in domain authority and SEO results over coming months](https://fathom.video/share/qycLyD5iLo8UfmnW4VzQNWSpyuKCZkDg?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy and Feedback

  - [Mark provided feedback on current articles, emphasizing need for AI-specific content](https://fathom.video/share/qycLyD5iLo8UfmnW4VzQNWSpyuKCZkDg?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
  - [Team explained strategy of mixing AI-specific and generic keywords for testing](https://fathom.video/share/qycLyD5iLo8UfmnW4VzQNWSpyuKCZkDg?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
  - [Agreed to focus on financial advisor ICP and related use cases for upcoming content](https://fathom.video/share/qycLyD5iLo8UfmnW4VzQNWSpyuKCZkDg?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)
  - [Discussion on balancing between specific automations and broader inspirational content](https://fathom.video/share/qycLyD5iLo8UfmnW4VzQNWSpyuKCZkDg?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)

### SEO Methodology and Tools

  - [Using Semrush, Google Trends, and Ahrefs for keyword research](https://fathom.video/share/qycLyD5iLo8UfmnW4VzQNWSpyuKCZkDg?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)
  - [Prioritizing keywords with low difficulty and decent search volume](https://fathom.video/share/qycLyD5iLo8UfmnW4VzQNWSpyuKCZkDg?tab=summary&timestamp=1125.0)
  - [Semrush used for tracking domain authority (currently at 2 for knap.ai)](https://fathom.video/share/qycLyD5iLo8UfmnW4VzQNWSpyuKCZkDg?tab=summary&timestamp=1163.0)
  - [Plan to incorporate high-performing paid ad keywords into SEO strategy as product matures](https://fathom.video/share/qycLyD5iLo8UfmnW4VzQNWSpyuKCZkDg?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)

### Content Development Process

  - [Multiple review stages: writers, editors, and internal team before publishing](https://fathom.video/share/qycLyD5iLo8UfmnW4VzQNWSpyuKCZkDg?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)
  - [Recommendation to focus on reviewing high-performing articles rather than all content](https://fathom.video/share/qycLyD5iLo8UfmnW4VzQNWSpyuKCZkDg?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Plan to replace underperforming articles within the 400-article budget](https://fathom.video/share/qycLyD5iLo8UfmnW4VzQNWSpyuKCZkDg?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)

### Website Transition

  - [Switching from knap.ai to knapsack.ai](https://fathom.video/share/qycLyD5iLo8UfmnW4VzQNWSpyuKCZkDg?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)
  - [Need to ensure content doesn't hard-code old domain name](https://fathom.video/share/qycLyD5iLo8UfmnW4VzQNWSpyuKCZkDg?tab=summary&timestamp=1238.0)
  - [SEO metrics will take time to reflect new domain (weeks to months)](https://fathom.video/share/qycLyD5iLo8UfmnW4VzQNWSpyuKCZkDg?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Team to focus on creating content for financial advisor ICP and related use cases](https://fathom.video/share/qycLyD5iLo8UfmnW4VzQNWSpyuKCZkDg?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)
  - [Mark to share when new knapsack.ai website is live](https://fathom.video/share/qycLyD5iLo8UfmnW4VzQNWSpyuKCZkDg?tab=summary&timestamp=1610.0)
  - [Team to update SEMrush tracking for new domain once website transitions](https://fathom.video/share/qycLyD5iLo8UfmnW4VzQNWSpyuKCZkDg?tab=summary&timestamp=1613.0)
  - [Continue developing and publishing content, with ongoing performance monitoring](https://fathom.video/share/qycLyD5iLo8UfmnW4VzQNWSpyuKCZkDg?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)
  - [Mark to review high-level content structure (H2s, H3s) before publishing if desired](https://fathom.video/share/qycLyD5iLo8UfmnW4VzQNWSpyuKCZkDg?tab=summary&timestamp=767.0)
  - [Team to share metrics on content performance to guide future optimizations](https://fathom.video/share/qycLyD5iLo8UfmnW4VzQNWSpyuKCZkDg?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)
